card.text: Flying Persist (When this creature dies, if it had no -1/-1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a -1/-1 counter on it.)

card.name: Serpent Night Dragon
card.text: Emerge {5}{B} (You may cast this spell by sacrificing a creature and paying the emerge cost reduced by that creature's mana value.) Flying You may cast this card from your graveyard for its emerge cost.

card.name: Reload
card.text: Put any number of cards from your hand on the bottom of your library, then draw that many cards plus one. Flashback {4}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Advance Draw
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, behold a blue creature with mana value 8 or greater or pay 2. (To behold a blue creature with mana value 8 or greater or pay 2, choose a blue creature with mana value 8 or greater or pay 2 you control or reveal a blue creature with mana value 8 or greater or pay 2 card from your hand.) Draw four cards.

card.name: Rush Recklessly
card.text: Target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains trample until end of turn. Then that creature deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control. Flashback {3}{G}{G}{G} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: D. Tribe
card.text: Destroy target permanent. It's controller creates a 3/3 red Dragon creature token with flying.

card.name: Monster Gate
card.text: Target permanent's controller sacrifices it. Then they reveal cards from the top of their library until they reveal a creature card. They put that card onto the battlefield, then shuffle all other cards revealed this way into their library. Flashback {6}{R}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Fusion Recovery
card.text: Choose one or both — • Return up to one target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand. • Remove any number of target creature cards with fusion in your graveyard from the game. (Return them to your sideboard if you have one.) Flashback {5}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Different Dimension Gate
card.text: Flash When this enchantment enters, for each player, choose up to one target nonland permanent that player controls. Exile those permanents until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Heart of the Underdog
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, look at the top card of your library. If it's a creature card, you may reveal it and put it into your hand. Otherwise, you may put that card on the bottom of your library.

card.name: Dark Magic Curtain
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay half your life, rounded down. Search your library for a Wizard card and put it onto the battlefield. Then the owner of each other creature you control shuffles it into their library. Exile Dark Magic Curtain.

card.name: Treasure YUB
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Dragon YUB
card.text: Flying
